expectations.text: Anemia classified as MODERATE (Hb 9.2 is in 7-9.9 range)
expectations.evidence: Output states 'The patient has anemia with a hemoglobin of 9.2 g/dL. This is below the normal pregnancy threshold of 11 g/dL.' It does not classify the anemia by severity (mild/moderate/severe) using WHO thresholds. The word 'moderate' does not appear.

expectations.text: Iron dose is 120mg elemental iron daily (therapeutic, not prophylactic)
expectations.evidence: Output says 'Start oral iron supplementation (ferrous sulfate) daily' without specifying a dose. No mention of 120mg elemental iron or therapeutic dosing. The recommendation is generic and non-specific.

Output states 'Recheck hemoglobin at a follow-up visit' and 'Recheck hemoglobin at follow-up' under Follow-up. While the timing is vague (no specific interval stated), the next visit is at 20 weeks (~9 weeks away), which is within 1-3 months. Borderline pass — recheck is mentioned but timing is imprecise.

expectations.text: Dietary counseling on iron-rich foods mentioned
expectations.evidence: Output mentions 'Encourage iron-rich foods in diet (meat, beans, leafy greens)' and 'Counsel on increasing protein and iron-rich food intake.' Dietary counseling is present though less detailed than the with_skill version.
Output says 'Folic acid supplementation daily' without specifying the dose of 400mcg (0.4mg). The dose is absent.
